description: Print CRC and size for each file.

option.name: --algorithm
tip: U: -a, --algorithm <ALGORITHM>
select the digest type to use. See DIGEST below
[possible values: sysv, bsd, crc, crc32b, md5, sha1, sha2, sha3, blake2b, sm3, sha224, sha256, sha384, sha512, blake3, shake128, shake256]

option.name: --base64
tip: emit a base64 digest, not hexadecimal

option.name: --check
tip: read checksums from the FILEs and check them

option.name: --debug
tip: print CPU hardware capability detection info used by cksum

option.name: --ignore-missing
tip: don't fail or report status for missing files

option.name: --length
tip: U: -l, --length <LENGTH>
digest length in bits;
must not exceed the max for the blake2 algorithm and must be a multiple of 8

option.name: --quiet
tip: don't print OK for each successfully verified file

option.name: --raw
tip: emit a raw binary digest, not hexadecimal

option.name: --status
tip: don't output anything, status code shows success

option.name: --strict
tip: exit non-zero for improperly formatted checksum lines

option.name: --tag
tip: create a BSD style checksum, undo --untagged (default)

option.name: --untagged
tip: create a reversed style checksum, without digest type

option.name: --version
tip: Show the version.

option.name: --warn
tip: warn about improperly formatted checksum lines

option.name: --zero
tip: end each output line with NUL, not newline, and disable file name escaping

common_option.name: --help
tip: Show the help.
